instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall allow driver manual gear override.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall execute driver gear request when Driver_Shift_Request equals TRUE.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall validate driver shift requests.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall verify target gear before executing driver override.

L4_requirements: IF Target_Gear IN Valid_Gear_List THEN Allow_Driver_Shift
IF Target_Gear NOT_IN Valid_Gear_List THEN Reject_Driver_Shift
IF Target_Gear IN Valid_Gear_List THEN Execute_Driver_Shift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent unsafe driver downshift.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject driver downshift when engine speed exceeds limit.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent driver override during active shift.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject driver shift request when Shift_State equals Active.

L4_requirements: IF Driver_Shift_Request = TRUE AND Shift_State = Active THEN Log_Shift_Rejection

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall exit driver override after timeout.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall return to automatic shift mode when override timer expires.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prioritize driver override over automatic shift.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall execute driver shift request before automatic shift logic.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable driver override during fault conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall block driver override when System_Fault equals TRUE.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect driver override faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect override fault when driver request is inconsistent.

L4_requirements: IF Driver_Request_Inconsistent = TRUE THEN Override_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall monitor driver override activity.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall record diagnostic data during driver override operation.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall clear override state after shift completion.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reset driver override logic after gear change completes.
